headline: 3 Reasons Investors Love Quanta (PWR)
summary: The past six months have been a windfall for Quanta’s shareholders. The company’s stock price has jumped 47.7%, setting a new 52-week high of $608.95 per share. This was partly thanks to its solid quarterly results, and the run-up might have investors contemplating their next move.

headline: 5 Construction Stocks Set to Surprise With Q1 Earnings
summary: Data center and power demand, along with mission-critical projects, give these construction stocks, like FIX, MTZ, PWR, EME and DY, strong growth momentum.

summary: Brian Sullivan's sources tell him it is not clear who is actually "running" Iran, which Trump essentially confirmed Tuesday night.

headline: Did Quanta’s Backlog-Fueled Earnings Outperformance Just Shift Quanta Services' (PWR) Investment Narrative?
summary: Recent commentary on Quanta Services highlights that, ahead of its late-April 2026 earnings release, the company has been consistently beating profit estimates and supporting demand with an average 18% annual backlog increase over the last two years. Analysts are also pointing to Quanta’s double-digit earnings per share growth over the past two years as evidence that its expanding backlog is translating into stronger profitability than many peers. We’ll now examine how Quanta’s consistent...
